_comment: Copy to balatro.config.json and edit. QUICK PATH: set BASE_URL / BASE_KEY / MODEL in .env and run with no model argument. API keys come ONLY from env vars named by each model's apiKeyEnv — never put keys in this file. Submission goes to the public Evalatro leaderboard by default; set SUBMIT=false or pass --no-submit to opt out entirely.
_launchMode_comment: spawn starts Balatro through balatrobot from PATH. attach connects to an already-running balatrobot HTTP server; use attach for Linux Steam+Proton (experimental, untested).
_targetAnte_comment: Evalatro v2 target: clearing Ante 12 with no illegal moves scores 100. Clearing Ante 8 is only the base-game win, not a benchmark win.
_evalProfile_comment: Use a dedicated Balatro profile slot for benchmark runs. 0 disables profile switching/unlock automation.
